DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LUE'S MOTION TO REOPEN DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A COMPELLING NEED FOR DISCOVERY AND A SATISFACTORY EXPLANATION OF WHY DISCOVERY WAS NOT COMPLETED SOONER. PERMITTING DISCOVERY WILL NOT PREVENT THIS CASE FROM GOING TO TRIAL ON THE DATE CURRENTLY SET, 3/12/12. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED

Mtn To Reopen Disco
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF WILLIAM LUE'S Motion to Reopen Discovery IS Granted. Plaintiff has shown a compelling need for discovery and a satisfactory explanation of why discovery was not completed sooner. Permitting discovery will not prevent this case from going to trial on the date currently set, 3/12/12. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported. =302/MM
